name: Banana Vanilla Wafer Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 pint heavy cream, or whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the vanilla wafers on a plate in a round circle.
2. Add vanilla to whipped cream.
3. Place sliced bananas on top, cover with whipped cream. Repeat to make 3 - 4 layers.
4. Refrigerate, covered at least 4 hours or overnight.
Makes 12 servings.
